SEARCH
Package org.fluentjdbc

Interface DbContextListableSelect<T extends DbContextListableSelect<T>>

All Superinterfaces:
DatabaseQueryable<T>, DbContextSelectResult
All Known Implementing Classes:
DbContextJoinedSelectBuilder, DbContextSelectBuilder, DbContextTableQueryBuilder
public interface DbContextListableSelect<T extends DbContextListableSelect<T>> extends DatabaseQueryable<T>, DbContextSelectResult
Interface to execute terminal operations for SELECT-statements. Usage: 
 try (DbContextConnection ignored = context.startConnection(dataSource)) {
     table.where...().list(row -> row.getUUID("column"));
     table.where...().single(row -> row.getLocalDate("column"));
 }

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    forEach(DatabaseResult.RowConsumer consumer)
    Executes the SELECT * FROM ... statement and calls back to DatabaseResult.RowConsumer for each returned row
    int
    getCount()
    Executes SELECT count(*) FROM ... on the query and returns the result
    T
    orderBy(String orderByClause)
    Adds ORDER BY ... clause to the SELECT statement

    query, where, where, where, whereAll, whereAll, whereColumnValuesEqual, whereExpression, whereExpression, whereExpressionWithParameterList, whereIn, whereIn, whereOptional, whereOptional, whereSubselect

    Methods inherited from interface org.fluentjdbc.DbContextSelectResult

    list, listInt, listLongs, listStrings, singleInputStream, singleInstant, singleInt, singleLong, singleObject, singleReader, singleString, stream
